docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,900.00 FILED BY VARGAS, RANDOLPH MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT PARK STREET PROPERTIES LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VARGAS, RANDOLPH MARTIN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-16-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VARGAS, RANDOLPH MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT PARK STREET PROPERTIES LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00 SERVED MAY-08-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PARK STREET PROPERTIES LLC
DECLARATION TO CHANGE HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF VARGAS, RANDOLPH MARTIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-21-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VARGAS, RANDOLPH MARTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARK STREET PROPERTIES LLC $1,820.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,870.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF VS DEFENDANT. DISCARDED FOOD $1020, EATING OUT FOR 1 MONTH $800 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF VARGAS, RANDOLPH MARTIN
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-21-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-21-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-21-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF RANDOLPH MARTIN VARGAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PARK STREET PROPERTIES LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LOREN ALVARADO, SENIOR PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2025 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO AUG-08-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 - PLAINTIFF RANDOLPH MARTIN VARGAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PARK STREET PROPERTIES LLC IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PARK STREET PROPERTIES LLC
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 05/14/2025. SC-100 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER UNCLAIMED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PARK STREET PROPERTIES LLC
